name: one2novel
description: 从一句灵感到一本小说 — AI 驱动的长篇小说创作工作台

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @one2novel/shared build && pnpm --filter @one2novel/server build && pnpm --filter @one2novel/client build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @one2novel/shared build && pnpm --filter @one2novel/server typecheck && pnpm --filter @one2novel/client typecheck
